name: Community Center. Main Organized Crime Group of Russia
overview: Former members of the Obshchak criminal group are telling for the first time how the exemplary Soviet city of Komsomolsk became the criminal capital of the Far East; why, 20 years after the death of the leader of the Obshchak, Evgeny Vasin, they are still called Batey; and how the tragedy that destroyed both Vasin and his empire occurred.
